tools.name: jobFeed.getIndustries
tools.description:
The Industries endpoint returns all the Industries and related sub industries 
defined in WorkBC's Job Board. The response includes the id and caption for 
each industry and each sub industry.

tools.name: jobFeed.getJobTypes
tools.description:
The Job Types endpoint returns details of all of the
job types defined in WorkBC's Job Board. The response includes the
id and caption.

tools.name: jobFeed.getMajorProjects
tools.description:
The Major Projects endpoint returns details of all of the
major projects defined in WorkBC's Job Board. The response includes the
id and caption.

tools.name: jobFeed.getRegions
tools.description:
The Regions endpoint returns details of all of the
regions defined in WorkBC's Job Board. The response includes the
id and caption.

tools.name: jobFeed.postJobs
tools.description: The job feed endpoint returns an array of job records that satisfy the supplied criteria.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
